_note: Locked multi-event test set for the firehose harness. Post-COVID, fixed window 2022-09-01 -> present (a few months before ChatGPT 2022-11-30, capturing NVDA's Oct-2022 base). All US-listed (incl. ADRs/ETFs) so they're firehose-named and Fidelity-tradeable. peak_multiple from yfinance close over 2022-09..2025-12 (NVDA/SMCI/etc.) — approximate, re-pinned at build time. This set measures the DISTRIBUTION (recall/precision/aggregate), not the BWET point; it's a hindsight set (survivors), and the curator model is trained past all of it, so results are an UPPER BOUND / dev harness, never the verdict.

gems.name: NVIDIA
gems.vehicle_note: mega-cap, not 'hidden' — the canonical AI trade; included by request

gems.name: Super Micro
gems.catalyst: AI server demand, then accounting blowup
gems.vehicle_note: ran ~14x then -75% on accounting/auditor exit — tests the thesis-decay exit

gems.name: Global X Uranium ETF
gems.vehicle_note: theme ETF; CCJ/individual miners ran more

gems.name: YPF (Argentina ADR)
gems.vehicle_note: US-listed ADR; bank ADRs (GGAL/BMA/BBAR) ran ~6x — purest vehicle beat ARGT ETF (~2x)

gems.name: Rheinmetall (US OTC ADR)
gems.vehicle_note: OTC ADR — thin liquidity / wide spreads; native RHM.DE not used (FX friction)

gems.name: Breakwave Tanker Shipping ETF
gems.vehicle_note: the original gem; niche freight-futures ETN, purest vehicle vs tanker operators

optional.name: Vistra
optional.why_held_out: AI-power-demand 2024 (~5.7x) — trimmed to keep AI to three; add for a utility/power shape

optional.name: Carvana
optional.why_held_out: ~70x distressed turnaround/squeeze — likely NOT firehose-detectable thematically; stress case only

dropped.name: iPath Cocoa ETN
dropped.why: delisted/suspended 2024 — no clean tradeable yfinance history (222 days, broken)
